div.div: In the 2000s I got involved in my first online community when I joined the "USI" racing clan for the game Trackmania Nations ESWC. I also started posting my own tracks onto Trackmania Exchange around this time as well.

div.div: The 2010s are dominated by the outsized influence of DOTA 2. At the time I was playing it, it completely monopolized the media I consumed.

Watching DOTA 2 Esports was my gateway into Twitch.tv. I started watching Northernlion after happening across his stream one day. I started watching Moonmoon_ow when Overwatch was just out and I happened across his stream under that game category.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 737px; margin-left: 662px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 336px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.div: The release of Trackmania (2020) brought me back into the community and I ended up getting more involved than I was previously.
Adjacent to the NLSS cohort, Mathas started the Chilluminati Podcast and I started listening since I also knew about Jesse Cox from the Co-optional podcast.
